name: MIZU BUNSHIN NO JUTSU (WATER REPLICATION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Sution)

Rank: 4

Chakra Cost: 5

Learn DC: 18 | Successes: 5

Perform: 6 | Perform DC: 19

Components: E, F, S, Mas

This forbidden creates clones made from water within range. Each clone must appear within 10 ft. of the source of water used to create it.

Appearance: Water clones weigh half as much as you do (worn equipment included). While underwater, the clone is invisible to creatures that cannot see Chakra.

Statistics: Water clones' have the following additions:

- Their maximum HP equals your character level.
- They have a swim speed equal to twice your base land speed
- They take a -4 penalty to attack rolls
- They take a -5 penalty to Defense
- They take a -4 penalty to saving throws
- They have water resistance 10
- They can stand on liquid as if it were solid

Water clones suffer a -1 penalty to attack rolls and skill checks when moved further than 100 feet from the source of water that created them.

Combat: Water clones cannot make more than two attacks per round. If a water clone takes electric damage from a technique and survives, for the next 1d4+1 rounds its melee attacks will deal an amount of additional electric damage equal to the rank of that technique.

Empower: Spend 3 Chakra per clone to create additional clones. You can control a maximum of 1 water clone, plus one per three character levels.

Mastery: The first step lets you create clones one size category smaller than you, applying appropriate size modifiers. Such clones have half the normal weight.

The fifth step lets you alter the appearance of the clones at will, including changing their equipment. You can only replicate simple equipment in this manner, (GM's discretion).
